html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Toa’s shedding has been fueled by chronic stress that hasn’t fully eased yet. It can’t always be switched off overnight—but this plan helps her regain control right now by calming nightly awakenings, easing rumination, and rebuilding her inner foundation through sleep, stress recovery, and balanced nourishment. She’s in the stabilization phase, where shedding steadies so regrowth can follow. Each small routine shift makes her follicles feel safe to grow again, turning depletion into steady repair. 🌱

Start today—calm consistency will move you from shedding to visible regrowth.
